description_long: This is a modern greenhouse structure with a pitched glass roof and large transparent wall panels, supported by a dark metal frame. The greenhouse sits on a circular landscaped base featuring green, textured terrain and a winding stone path leading to the main entrance. The front facade has a prominent double-door entry, while the sides and roof are composed of evenly spaced glass panes, maximizing natural light. A small lamp post and a couple of circular stepping stones are visible near the entrance, adding to the landscaped setting. The interior appears empty, with no visible plants or furnishings through the clear glass panels. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban parks, community gardens, or residential backyards.
description: A modern, glass-paneled greenhouse with a dark metal frame, pitched roof, and landscaped circular base featuring a stone path and lamp post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entrance, pitched glass roof, and landscaped base with a lamp post.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long glass wall panels and the rectangular extension at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear view of the back entrance, stone path, and additional landscaping details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the glass wall panels and the rear extension, with the lamp post visible in the background.
